zh.lifeSummary: 當Diarmait Mac Murchada King of Leinster, Ireland於大約1110年出生在愛爾蘭萊音斯特時，他的父親Donnchad Mac Murchada55歲，母親Orlaith Ingen O'Braenain50歲。他和Mór Ní Tuathail至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1171年5月1日在愛爾蘭庫迪 懷可福德費恩斯享年62歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Diarmait Mac Murchada King of Leinster, Ireland于大约1110年出生在爱尔兰萊音斯特时，他的父亲Donnchad Mac Murchada55岁，母亲Orlaith Ingen O'Braenain50岁。他和Mór Ní Tuathail至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1171年5月1日在爱尔兰庫迪 懷可福德費恩斯享年62岁，埋葬在爱尔兰。

nameMeanings.name: Mac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Cuong, Minh, Lien, Muoi, Thanh, Tho, Tieu, Vinh, Anh, Beo, Binh, Chau.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 麥 (see   Mai   2) and 莫 (see   Mo   1).
Vietnamese (Mạc): from Chinese 莫 ‘nothing; nonexistent’; see Mo 1.

variants.name: Mai
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Thanh, Hoa, Son, Dung, Long, Binh, Minh, Thu, Hue, Huong, Thuy.  Chinese Chi, Hong, Ho, Sang, Han, Hang, Jian, Li, Man, Mei, Sen, Wei.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 麥, meaning ‘wheat’ in Chinese: (i) from Mai Qiu (麥丘), the title of a man in the state of Qi (located mainly in present-day Shandong province) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), who, despite being very old, came to celebrate the birthday of the Duke Huan of Qi (ruler of the state of Qi, died 643  BC ). His descendants inherited 麥, the first part of his title, as their surname. (ii) borne by descendants of Mai Tie Zhang (麥鐵杖), a famous general during the Sui dynasty (581–618  AD ). His descendants were scattered around southern China.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 買, meaning ‘buy’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of the king Song Weizi, founder of the state of Song. (ii) borne by descendants of the Duke Dao of Xu (ruler of the state of Xu, 546–523  BC ), possibly inheriting his personal name. (iii) from the first element of the personal name Mai Zhu Chu (買朱鉏), style name of an official who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iv) it has also been traced back to other ethnic groups in northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Diarmait
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Earlier Diarm(u)it, of uncertain derivation; perhaps from dí ‘without’ + airmit ‘injunction’ or airmait ‘envy’. See also Dermot .

variants.name: Diarmuid
meanings: Earlier Diarm(u)it, of uncertain derivation; perhaps from dí ‘without’ + airmit ‘injunction’ or airmait ‘envy’. See also Dermot .

variants.name: Dermot
meanings: Anglicized form of the Irish name Diarmaid , now also used elsewhere in the English-speaking world. In Irish legend, Diarmaid was the lover of Gráinne, who had been promised to the ageing hero Finn mac Cumhaill, leader of the Fianna. The lovers eloped, but were pursued for sixteen years by Finn; according to one version of the story, Diarmaid was eventually killed by a wild boar and Gráinne died of grief.

historicEvents.description: Arrival of Normans at Baginbun in Co. Wexford thus started 800 year struggle between English and Irish.

en.lifeSummary: When Diarmait Mac Murchada King of Leinster, Ireland was born about 1110, in Leinster, Ireland, his father, Donnchad Mac Murchada, was 55 and his mother, Orlaith Ingen O'Braenain, was 50. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Mór Ní Tuathail. He died on 1 May 1171, in Ferns, County Wexford, Ireland, at the age of 62, and was buried in Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Diarmait Mac Murchada King of Leinster, Ireland est né environ 1110, à Leinster, Irlande, son père, Donnchad Mac Murchada, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Orlaith Ingen O'Braenain, avait 50 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Mór Ní Tuathail. Il est décédé le 1 mai 1171, à Ferns, County Wexford, Irlande, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Diarmait Mac Murchada King of Leinster, Ireland um 1110 in Leinster, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Donnchad Mac Murchada 55 und seine Mutter Orlaith Ingen O'Braenain 50. Er hatte mit Mór Ní Tuathail mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 1. Mai 1171 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Ferns, County Wexford, Irland und wurde in Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Diarmait Mac Murchada King of Leinster, Ireland è nato il circa 1110 nel Leinster, Irlanda, il suo padre, Donnchad Mac Murchada, aveva 55 anni e il suo madre, Orlaith Ingen O'Braenain, aveva 50 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Mór Ní Tuathail. Morì il 1 maggio 1171, nel Ferns, County Wexford, Irlanda, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Irlanda.

ja.Diocese of Dublin, Leinster, Ireland: アイルランドディオセゼ オフ ダブリン
ja.Ferns, County Wexford, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ ウエクスフォードフエルンス
ja.Baile Atha Luain, Athlone, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ ウエストメアスアスロン
ja.Leinster, Ireland: アイルランドレインスター
ja.lifeSummary: Diarmait Mac Murchada King of Leinster, Irelandが約1110年にアイルランドレインスターで生まれた時，父Donnchad Mac Murchadaは55歳，母Orlaith Ingen O'Braenainは50歳であった。彼はMór Ní Tuathailとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1171年5月1日にアイルランドコウントイ ウエクスフォードフエルンスで62歳で死去し，アイルランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Diarmait Mac Murchada King of Leinster, Ireland(이)가 대략 1110년 아일랜드 레인스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Donnchad Mac Murchada(은)는 55세였고, 그의 어머니 Orlaith Ingen O'Braenain(은)는 50세였다. 그는 Mór Ní Tuathail(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1171년 5월 1일 아일랜드 카운티 w스퍼드 퍼스에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Diarmait Mac Murchada King of Leinster, Ireland nasceu aproximadamente 1110, em Leinster, Irlanda, seu pai, Donnchad Mac Murchada, tinha 55 anos e sua mãe, Orlaith Ingen O'Braenain, tinha 50 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Mór Ní Tuathail. Ele faleceu em 1 de maio de 1171, em Ferns, County Wexford, Irlanda, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Diarmait Mac Murchada King of Leinster, Ireland родился около 1110 г. в местности линстир, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Donnchad Mac Murchada было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Orlaith Ingen O'Braenain, 50. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Mór Ní Tuathail. Он умер 1 мая 1171 г. в местности фирнс, коунти вексфорд, Ирландия в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности Ирландия.

sm.between 1126 and 1 May 1171: mai le 1126 e o'o I le 1 Me 1171

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Diarmait Mac Murchada King of Leinster, Ireland nació aproximadamente 1110, en Leinster, Irlanda, su papá, Donnchad Mac Murchada, tenía 55 años y su mamá, Orlaith Ingen O'Braenain, tenía 50 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Mór Ní Tuathail. Murió el 1 de mayo de 1171, en Ferns, County Wexford, Irlanda, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Irlanda.
